### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

Keeping documentation in sync with code is a persistent challenge in software development. At CodeGrind, we've implemented an automated system using GitHub Actions to tackle documentation drift. Our workflow automatically mirrors instruction files, corrects structural errors with bot-driven commits, and generates version-specific update pages. This ensures guides are always synchronized with our codebase, improving clarity for team members and AI agents alike. Discover how we keep our documentation current without manual intervention: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/03/10/automating-codegrind-documentation-sync/ #CodeGrind #DevOps #GitHubActions #Documentation #SoftwareDevelopment #Automation
